hero.label: Software Studio
hero.title: Design and code
hero.subtitle: We turn clear ideas into simple, fast digital products ready to grow with you from the first launch.
hero.stat_1_label: We define the idea before building
hero.foundation_note: We are starting with a simple promise: listen carefully, build with care, and stay transparent from the first message.

services.label: Our Solutions
services.title: Custom Digital Solutions
services.subtitle: From web applications to intelligent systems, we build the technology your business needs to scale.

items.title: Pages & Apps that Sell
items.description: Your online presence with professional design, incredible speed, and optimized to convert visitors into customers.
items.longDescription: We design and build websites that don't just look good — they work for you. We focus on user experience and performance so your customers find what they need fast and without friction. From landing pages to online stores, we create your window to the digital world.
highlights: Easy for your customers to use

items.title: Intelligent Systems
items.description: We automate your processes and connect your tools so you can focus on what really matters.
items.longDescription: We create the brain of your operation. We connect your databases, payment tools, and third-party systems into a robust and secure platform. If you have a repetitive task, we automate it. If you have scattered data, we organize it.
highlights: Connection with payments and social media
Systems that grow with your business

items.title: Your Business Always Online
items.description: Cloud infrastructure so your page never goes down and supports thousands of visits smoothly.
items.longDescription: We take care of all the technical complexity behind the scenes. We set up cloud servers that automatically adjust to the number of people visiting you, ensuring your investment is efficient and your site is always available.

items.title: Protection & Trust
items.description: Bank-level security to protect your data and your customers' privacy at all times.
items.longDescription: Security is not optional. We protect your intellectual property and your users' sensitive data following the highest industry standards. We conduct constant audits to ensure your business is a safe place to transact.

items.title: Amazing Experiences
items.description: We design interfaces your customers will love using, focused on ease and elegance.
items.longDescription: Good design is invisible: it just works. We create intuitive digital experiences that guide your users toward the action you want. From the first sketch to the final product, every detail is thought out to delight those who use it.
highlights: Prototypes so you see before building

items.title: Measurable Results
items.description: We give you the tools to understand your customers and improve your sales based on real data.
items.longDescription: What isn't measured can't be improved. We help you install and understand control dashboards that show you exactly what's happening in your digital business. This way you can invest with confidence where you actually get results.

projects.label: Our work
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real solutions for real problems. Every project is an opportunity to exceed expectations.

team.label: The Studio
team.title: Why Symmetrical Code?
team.subtitle: We combine high-level software engineering with a comprehensive approach geared towards empowering your business.

pillars.title: Software Architecture
pillars.description: We don't just write code; we design robust and scalable systems. We divide our tasks into specialties (Frontend, Backend, and DevOps) to ensure each piece of software receives expert attention.

pillars.title: Quality Standards
pillars.description: Trust is built with software that doesn't fail. We implement automated tests, rigorous code reviews, and security audits in every delivery.

pillars.title: Design that Converts
pillars.description: Software must be a business tool. We create intuitive interfaces designed for the end-user, optimizing speed and ease of use to maximize your sales.

footer.tagline: Innovation and excellence in software development
footer.project_desc: Our virtual assistant is ready to help you. Get your questions answered or schedule a consultation in minutes.
footer.whatsapp_message: Hello, I would like to get more information about your services.
footer.privacy_s1_body: At Symmetrical Code, we collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to share when communicating with us through our website or services.
footer.privacy_s2_body: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, respond to your inquiries and requests, send you information about our services and promotions, and protect against fraud and unauthorized activity.
footer.privacy_s3_body: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with service providers who help us operate our business, always under strict confidentiality obligations.
footer.privacy_s4_body: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
footer.privacy_s5_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at contacto@symmetricalcode.com.
footer.privacy_s6_body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
footer.privacy_s7_body: We may update this privacy policy periodically. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.
footer.terms_s1_body: By accessing and using the Symmetrical Code website, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our site.
footer.terms_s2_body: Symmetrical Code offers software development services, technology consulting, and infrastructure solutions. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any service without prior notice.
footer.terms_s3_body: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, icons, images, and software, is the property of Symmetrical Code or its content providers and is protected by copyright laws.
footer.terms_s4_body: Symmetrical Code will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.
footer.terms_s5_body: These terms are governed by the laws of Mexico. Any dispute related to these terms will be resolved in the courts of Guanajuato, Mexico.
footer.terms_s6_body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon publication.
footer.cookies_s1_body: Cookies are small text files that websites place on your device when you visit them. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to site owners.
footer.cookies_s2_essential_body: Necessary for the basic functioning of the site.
footer.cookies_s2_performance_body: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site.
footer.cookies_s2_functional_body: Allow us to remember your preferences to improve your experience.
footer.cookies_s3_body: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. Most browsers allow you to reject all cookies or to alert you when a cookie is being sent. However, if you block cookies, some parts of our site may not function properly.
footer.cookies_s4_body: We may use third-party services that can also place cookies on your device. We have no control over these cookies and recommend reviewing the privacy policies of those services.
footer.cookies_s5_body: By continuing to use our website, you agree to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
footer.cookies_s6_body: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to alert you when a cookie is being sent. Each browser has different procedures for managing cookies.

scene.studio_sub: Ideas in balance, code with purpose.
